alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; demonstrated stakeholder management and strategic advisory experience across cross-functional initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Be a trusted advisor to our customers and drive their AI strategies

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking, and calibration of AI tooling; owns product requirements, logic design, UAT, and rollout for transformation initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Build, design and refine conversational AI agents, gaining direct exposure to how these products are developed and improved

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years of scaling global commercial operations; two promotions; direct experience scoping, building, and shipping transformation programs at scale; leads cross-functional execution and delivery of complex initiatives
alignments.job_requirement: Drive execution and delivery of multiple complex, high-visibility agent development projects

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial operations and transformation background demonstrates cross-functional coordination; product operations experience combining technical and business stakeholder management; Salesforce admin experience managing engineering partnerships on feature requests
alignments.job_requirement: Coordinate across technical and non-technical stakeholders through the full agent development lifecycle process

alignments.job_requirement: Contribute data-driven, strategic insights to customers and internal team decisions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years of product operations and transformation work; owns conversational design and AI agent development methodology; technical product ownership (requirements, logic, UAT, rollout); Salesforce administration demonstrates technical systems thinking
alignments.job_requirement: Strong understanding of software development, product management and engineering principles, enabling you to act as a strategic partner

gaps.gap: No stated native product-management experience or SDLC depth in traditional product management role titles; product work stems from operations and transformation ownership rather than as PM
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's operational product ownership, requirements design, UAT leadership, and rollout execution map directly to the agent-development lifecycle described; depth gap is primarily in PM-centric terminology and title, not strategic execution capability

gaps.gap: Limited direct consulting experience or case-team background; no stated exposure to advisory customer engagement models typical of consultancies
gaps.mitigation: Strategist role emphasizes internal coordination and customer partnership as trusted advisor rather than pure consulting services; candidate's stakeholder management and transformation delivery experience translates to advisory relationship-building, though consulting brand/methodology is absent

gaps.gap: No stated conversational design, NLP, or chatbot/agent platform experience; AI agent work is current and learning-focused
gaps.mitigation: Candidate actively designs, specs, and directs LLM agents and owns evaluation methodology; hands-on current exposure to AI tooling and production agent systems mitigates lack of prior domain experience; domain expertise builds quickly with immersion

gaps.gap: Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, or advanced Python not stated; Python is basic and actively learning
gaps.mitigation: Role emphasizes strategic partnership and product strategy over production coding; candidate's data-analysis Python (pandas track) and SQL proficiency support analytical contribution without requiring software-engineering-level programming

output.level_rationale: Strategist title focusing on agent product strategy, customer advisory, and multi-project execution across technical and non-technical stakeholders. No explicit years or people management scope stated. complexity and strategic responsibility suggest 5–7 year senior-IC range. Company stage and reporting context not disclosed, reducing level confidence.
output.summary: Agent Strategist role at Sierra emphasizes customer advisory, conversational AI design, multi-project delivery, and cross-functional stakeholder coordination—strong fit for Strategy and Operations positioning. Candidate's eight years scaling commercial operations, transformation delivery, and product ownership (requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout), combined with hands-on AI agent methodology and data analytics, directly map to core responsibilities. Gaps are primarily in PM title/SDLC terminology and consulting brand; execution capability, stakeholder management, and strategic problem-solving are well demonstrated. Python remains basic, and agent/conversational-design domain is current learning; both are manageable in strategist role that prioritizes business partnership over production engineering. Estimated level L5 (senior IC); posted role seniority fits upper-L4 to lower-L6 band depending on company scale and reporting line (undisclosed).
